name: Chat Manager
description: Logs chat messages and enforces configurable message length limits for players and hosts.
author: miniduikboot & HayashiUme

name: Custom Game Codes
description: Assigns game room codes from word lists placed in the Boot.Codes/ folder (4 or 6 letter codes).
author: miniduikboot & HayashiUme

name: Welcome Messages
description: Sends a localised welcome message when players join a room.
author: Fangkuai & HayashiUme

name: Friend Code Validator
description: Kicks clients whose friend code does not match the official AB+#XXXX format.
author: MatchDuck & HayashiUme

name: Fixed Room Code
description: Assigns a fixed room code to a host based on their friend code.
author: HayashiUme

name: Custom Title
description: Assigns a title based on their friend code and show in front of their name.
author: HayashiUme

name: Player Channel
description: using /s <text> to send an only channel message by friendcode
author: HayashiUme

name: QQ群验证API
description: [仅限中国]，搭配 [本插件](https://github.com/HayashiUme/LLOneBot_Empostor_Verify) 使用
author: HayashiUme

name: Narrator
description: AI-powered meeting assistant using DeepSeek. Use /narrator during meetings to get strategic advice. Host commands: /narrator enable/disable/limit.
author: ELinmei
